title: Urotsukidôji II: Legend of the Demon Womb
original_title: 超神伝説うろつき童子 魔胎伝
overview: In this sequel to Urotsukidoji: Legend of the Overfiend, the unbelievable sexual violence of the Overfiend and his cohorts from Hell continues to wreak havoc on the earth. Who can stop this relentless onslaught? Urotsukidōji II: Legend of the Demon Womb was originally released as a 2 episode OVA series from December 1, 1990 to April 10, 1991 but was later re-release as a compilation film on July 21, 1991.
